secondary_keywords.keyword: best free AI writing tools for novelists

content_gaps: True monthly-cost comparison incl. bring-your-own-key (NovelCrafter ~$4 BYO vs bundled plans) — most listicles list sticker price only.
Genuinely free options (Raptor Write, Squibler free tier) are under-covered in the top roundups.
A concrete multi-tool workflow (draft + manuscript software + brainstorm) rather than a flat ranking.
recommended_angle: IF pursued later: a hands-on test using one fixed manuscript across tools (to match the SERP's testing bar) + a true-cost table including BYO-key + a free-options section. A thin affiliate roundup will not rank here.
reason: Honest verdict from the real SERP: this head term is HIGH difficulty. Page one is dominated by an established authority (Kindlepreneur), the vendor's own domain (Sudowrite), and multiple genuinely hands-on 'X tools tested' listicles with strong methodology (e.g. 'same 30,000-word manuscript'). A brand-new site with no topical authority and no real testing data will not rank short-term. Recommendation: DEFER the head term; first build authority on lower-competition long-tail that the SERP shows real demand for — start with 'Sudowrite vs NovelCrafter' (B2, comparison) and 'best free AI writing tools for novelists' (B4), which are narrower and more winnable, then revisit this head term once the cluster has links and (ideally) real hands-on testing to offer.
